tasks.title: Unify dashboard credit account presentation
tasks.objective: Update the combined dashboard so Account Credits presents one credit account instead of separate creator and participant credit panels.
authority: Treat all displayed dashboard credits as one account credit type.
Keep the dashboard credit states limited to Available, In use, and Used.
Do not change ledger accounting or credit costs unless implementation proves the UI cannot be fixed without it.
Do not add feedback tasks to the main task ledger.
acceptance_criteria: The combined `/dashboard` Account Credits section renders a single credit summary, not separate Demo Creator and Demo Participant credit panels.
The dashboard does not describe or visually divide credits as creator credits versus participant credits.
Available, In use, and Used remain the only dashboard credit states.
Created Cohorts and Interested Cohorts still render their existing cohort/event content.
Dashboard and MVP verification tests cover the unified credit account presentation.
verification: Run `npm test -- tests/dashboards.test.mjs tests/mvp-verification.test.mjs` if supported, or run `npm test`.
Run `npm run check` before issue closeout.
tasks.stop_condition: Stop when the dashboard presents one credit account and verification passes.
tasks.evidence: 2026-05-31 08:19 EDT: Added a combined dashboard service result with a de-duplicated account credit balance, rendered one Account Credits summary on `/dashboard`, and updated dashboard/MVP tests to reject split Demo Creator/Demo Participant credit panels. `npm test -- tests/dashboards.test.mjs tests/mvp-verification.test.mjs`, `npm run lint`, and `npm run check` passed; browser smoke confirmed `/dashboard` has one Account Credits summary with no Demo Creator/Demo Participant credit headings.
